column1: # ZAP Baseline Scan Rules — MOBO Platform
# ── Informational / low-risk noise — downgrade to WARN ────────────────────────
# 10015 — Incomplete or No Cache-control Header (API responses don't need caching)
# 10109 — Modern Web Application (detection, not a vulnerability)
# 90022 — Application Error Disclosure (caught by error handler)
# 10010 — Cookie No HttpOnly Flag — FAIL (we set HttpOnly on all cookies)
# 10012 — Password Autocomplete in Browser — WARN (mobile app, not web form)
# 10054 — Cookie with SameSite Attribute Problems — WARN
# 10023 — Information Disclosure - Debug Error Messages — FAIL
# 10024 — Information Disclosure - Sensitive Information in URL — WARN
# 10036 — Server Leaks Version Information via "Server" Header — WARN
# 10037 — Server Leaks Information via "X-Powered-By" Header — FAIL
# 10038 — Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set — FAIL
# 10094 — Base64 Disclosure — WARN (JWTs are base64, not secrets)
